title: E2B Sandbox Template
description: A reusable sandbox base image definition derived from the E2B Template API.

names.description: Full names including team namespace and tag, e.g. team-slug/my-template:default.

public.description: Whether the template is public or restricted to the owning team.

cpuCount.description: Default vCPU count for sandboxes created from this template.

memoryMB.description: Default memory in MiB for sandboxes created from this template.

buildID.description: Identifier of the most recent successful build of the template.

tags.description: User-defined tags applied to the template.
